validations.name: Run Repair Bay V3 deterministic baseline, comparison, session, export, and UI verification
Run Repair Bay V3 live read-only Windows inventory verification

argv:
exec('import hashlib
import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path

root = Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
sys.path.insert(0, str(root))

from core.repair_bay_diagnostics import run_launcher_index, run_repair_bay_scan
from core.repair_bay_handoff import build_repair_handoff

before = {
    path.name: hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
    for path in root.glob("*.bat")
    if path.is_file()
}

scan = run_repair_bay_scan(
    root,
    mode="full",
    context={"validation": "repair_bay_v2_5_live_healthy_launcher"},
)
index = run_launcher_index(
    root,
    context={"validation": "repair_bay_v2_5_live_healthy_launcher"},
)

after = {
    path.name: hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
    for path in root.glob("*.bat")
    if path.is_file()
}
assert before == after, "Launcher files changed during the read-only validation."

scan_inventory = (scan.get("evidence") or {}).get("launcher_inventory") or {}
index_inventory = index.get("inventory") or {}
assert scan_inventory.get("unresolved_items") == index_inventory.get("unresolved_items")
assert scan_inventory.get("obsolete_looking_candidates") == index_inventory.get("obsolete_looking_candidates")
assert scan_inventory.get("exact_duplicate_groups") == index_inventory.get("exact_duplicate_groups")

unresolved = list(scan_inventory.get("unresolved_items") or [])
candidates = list(scan_inventory.get("obsolete_looking_candidates") or [])
assert not unresolved, unresolved
assert not candidates, candidates

launcher_finding = next(
    item
    for item in scan.get("findings") or []
    if item.get("id") == "root_launcher_inventory"
)
assert launcher_finding.get("severity") == "informational", launcher_finding
assert "No repair is needed" in str(launcher_finding.get("suggested_action") or "")

plan_steps = (scan.get("proposed_repair_plan") or {}).get("steps") or []
assert not any(step.get("finding_id") == "root_launcher_inventory" for step in plan_steps)

handoff = build_repair_handoff(
    root,
    scan,
    "root_launcher_inventory",
    level="guided",
)
assert handoff.get("ok") is False, handoff
assert handoff.get("implementation_authorized") is False, handoff
assert "engineer_command" not in handoff, handoff
assert "No repair is needed" in str(handoff.get("message") or "")

for report in (scan, index):
    safety = report.get("safety") or {}
    assert safety.get("network_used") is False, safety
    assert safety.get("commands_run") is False, safety
    assert int(safety.get("files_written") or 0) == 0, safety
    assert int(safety.get("repairs_applied") or 0) == 0, safety

print(json.dumps({
    "REPAIR_BAY_V2_5_LIVE_OK": True,
    "launchers": index.get("summary", {}).get("total"),
    "duplicate_groups": len(scan_inventory.get("exact_duplicate_groups") or []),
    "raw_unknown": len(scan_inventory.get("raw_unknown_items") or []),
    "unresolved_after_resolution": len(unresolved),
    "review_candidates": len(candidates),
    "launcher_finding_severity": launcher_finding.get("severity"),
    "launcher_handoff_blocked": True,
    "launcher_files_changed": 0,
}, indent=2))')
